scripts.dev:runner-host:codex: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/index.js --provider codex
scripts.dev:runner-host:claude: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/index.js --provider claude
scripts.dev:fake-runner: corepack pnpm run compile && RUNNER_RUNTIME_MODE=fake node dist/index.js --local-smoke --provider fake
scripts.dev:fake-mcp: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/fake-mcp.js
scripts.test: corepack pnpm run compile && node --test dist/*.test.js
scripts.test:phase6: corepack pnpm run compile && node --test dist/*.test.js && node dist/smoke.js
scripts.smoke:phase6: corepack pnpm run compile && node dist/smoke.js
